zh: 船長，負責指揮船隻的人
en: The captain welcomed us aboard the boat.
en_example: The captain welcomed us aboard the boat.
zh_example: The captain welcomed us aboard the boat.
ja: 船長、船を指揮する人
ja_example: The captain welcomed us aboard the boat.

zh: 有自信的，充滿信心的
en: She looks confident when she speaks.
en_example: She looks confident when she speaks.
zh_example: She looks confident when she speaks.
ja: 自信のある、自信に満ちた
ja_example: She looks confident when she speaks.

zh: 肢體語言，透過身體動作傳達的訊息
en: Good body language can help you appear more confident.
en_example: Good body language can help you appear more confident.
zh_example: Good body language can help you appear more confident.
ja: ボディランゲージ、身体の動きで伝えるメッセージ
ja_example: Good body language can help you appear more confident.

zh: 暫停，停頓
en: Pause like a boss to emphasize your point.
en_example: Pause like a boss to emphasize your point.
zh_example: Pause like a boss to emphasize your point.
ja: 一時停止、間を取ること
ja_example: Pause like a boss to emphasize your point.

zh: 語助詞，說話時用來填補空白的詞語
en: Avoid using verbal fillers like 'um' and 'like' when speaking.
en_example: Avoid using verbal fillers like 'um' and 'like' when speaking.
zh_example: Avoid using verbal fillers like 'um' and 'like' when speaking.
ja: 言葉の埋め草、話の間を埋めるための言葉
ja_example: Avoid using verbal fillers like 'um' and 'like' when speaking.

zh: 超級英雄姿勢，一種展現自信的站姿
en: Adopt a superhero stance to boost your confidence on stage.
en_example: Adopt a superhero stance to boost your confidence on stage.
zh_example: Adopt a superhero stance to boost your confidence on stage.
ja: スーパーヒーローの姿勢、自信を示す立ち方
ja_example: Adopt a superhero stance to boost your confidence on stage.

zh: 姿勢，身體的站立或坐姿
en: Good posture helps you look more confident.
en_example: Good posture helps you look more confident.
zh_example: Good posture helps you look more confident.
ja: 姿勢、体の立ち方や座り方
ja_example: Good posture helps you look more confident.

zh: 眼神交流，與他人目光相接
en: Maintaining eye contact shows confidence.
en_example: Maintaining eye contact shows confidence.
zh_example: Maintaining eye contact shows confidence.
ja: アイコンタクト、相手と目を合わせること
ja_example: Maintaining eye contact shows confidence.

zh: 錄製自己，拍攝自己的影片
en: Video yourself to check your speaking techniques.
en_example: Video yourself to check your speaking techniques.
zh_example: Video yourself to check your speaking techniques.
ja: 自分をビデオ撮影する
ja_example: Video yourself to check your speaking techniques.

zh: 有目的的練習，有計劃地練習
en: Practice with purpose by setting specific goals each day.
en_example: Practice with purpose by setting specific goals each day.
zh_example: Practice with purpose by setting specific goals each day.
ja: 目的を持った練習、計画的な練習
ja_example: Practice with purpose by setting specific goals each day.

zh: 排練時間表，練習計劃表
en: Create a rehearsal schedule to prepare for your presentation.
en_example: Create a rehearsal schedule to prepare for your presentation.
zh_example: Create a rehearsal schedule to prepare for your presentation.
ja: リハーサルスケジュール、練習計画表
ja_example: Create a rehearsal schedule to prepare for your presentation.

zh: 逐字稿，完全照字面念的稿子
en: Avoid sounding robotic by not sticking strictly to your verbatim script.
en_example: Avoid sounding robotic by not sticking strictly to your verbatim script.
zh_example: Avoid sounding robotic by not sticking strictly to your verbatim script.
ja: 逐語稿、文字通りに読む原稿
ja_example: Avoid sounding robotic by not sticking strictly to your verbatim script.

zh: 重點式講稿筆記，簡短提示的講稿
en: Use bullet point speaker notes to keep your speech fresh.
en_example: Use bullet point speaker notes to keep your speech fresh.
zh_example: Use bullet point speaker notes to keep your speech fresh.
ja: 箇条書きのスピーカーノート、簡潔なメモ
ja_example: Use bullet point speaker notes to keep your speech fresh.

zh: 舞台魅力，演講者在舞台上的氣場與存在感
en: Stage presence means being fully present and engaging with your audience.
en_example: Stage presence means being fully present and engaging with your audience.
zh_example: Stage presence means being fully present and engaging with your audience.
ja: ステージプレゼンス、舞台上での存在感や魅力
ja_example: Stage presence means being fully present and engaging with your audience.

zh: 心中默念的正面句子，幫助提升自信
en: The silent sentence is a positive phrase you tell yourself silently before speaking.
en_example: The silent sentence is a positive phrase you tell yourself silently before speaking.
zh_example: The silent sentence is a positive phrase you tell yourself silently before speaking.
ja: 心の中で静かに唱える肯定的なフレーズ
ja_example: The silent sentence is a positive phrase you tell yourself silently before speaking.

zh: 焦慮，緊張不安的情緒
en: Many speakers feel anxiety before going on stage.
en_example: Many speakers feel anxiety before going on stage.
zh_example: Many speakers feel anxiety before going on stage.
ja: 不安、緊張
ja_example: Many speakers feel anxiety before going on stage.

zh: 不可能完成的指令
en: Telling yourself to be perfect is an impossible instruction.
en_example: Telling yourself to be perfect is an impossible instruction.
zh_example: Telling yourself to be perfect is an impossible instruction.
ja: 不可能な指示
ja_example: Telling yourself to be perfect is an impossible instruction.

zh: 更深層的目的或意義
en: Find your deeper purpose to stay motivated during your speech.
en_example: Find your deeper purpose to stay motivated during your speech.
zh_example: Find your deeper purpose to stay motivated during your speech.
ja: より深い目的
ja_example: Find your deeper purpose to stay motivated during your speech.

zh: 重複，反覆說
en: Repeating your silent sentence helps set you up for success.
en_example: Repeating your silent sentence helps set you up for success.
zh_example: Repeating your silent sentence helps set you up for success.
ja: 繰り返すこと
ja_example: Repeating your silent sentence helps set you up for success.

zh: 檢查清單，核對項目表
en: Use a checklist to monitor your thoughts before speaking.
en_example: Use a checklist to monitor your thoughts before speaking.
zh_example: Use a checklist to monitor your thoughts before speaking.
ja: チェックリスト
ja_example: Use a checklist to monitor your thoughts before speaking.

zh: 舒適圈，習慣的安全範圍
en: Reach outside your comfort zone to grow as a speaker.
en_example: Reach outside your comfort zone to grow as a speaker.
zh_example: Reach outside your comfort zone to grow as a speaker.
ja: コンフォートゾーン、快適な範囲
ja_example: Reach outside your comfort zone to grow as a speaker.
